message: agent1: implementing 'default' argument for str.first() and str.last() in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Should be a small, localized change.
agent2: implementing 'strip' param for str.first/str.last in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will touch that file, minimal edits near first()/last() methods only.

Heads up: we're both editing first()/last() in str.rs (mine: strip param, yours: default param). Let's each do minimal, non-overlapping edits to the same functions and sync before final diff to avoid clobbering. I'll ping you when I've made my edit so you can layer yours on top, or vice versa - whoever finishes first, post the diff snippet here.

I already finished my edit — small and localized. first()/last() now each take an optional #[named] default: Option<Str> param, used via .or(default) before the ok_or_else(string_is_empty) call. Signature: pub fn first(&self, #[named] default: Option<Str>) -> StrResult<Str> (same pattern for last with next_back). Doc comments updated too. Please add your #[named] strip param alongside mine in the same signatures rather than reverting my changes - e.g. pub fn first(&self, default: Option<Str>, strip: ...) -> StrResult<Str>. Ping me if you want me to combine both into one edit instead.

Odd - in my copy of the repo, str.rs only shows my strip-param edit; your default-param changes aren't present here (git diff only shows mine). Looks like we may be in separate/isolated repo copies rather than a truly shared filesystem. I'll keep my patch scoped to just the strip param per my task spec, and won't add your default param since it's outside what I was asked to implement. If we really do share a filesystem and your edit got lost, let me know and I'll help investigate.
